title: Hiring Category Manager at Tata CLiQ

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Tata CLiQ
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata CLiQ. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Tata CLiQ:
Tata CLiQ is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ!
